creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

I just checked your website.  Seems your company provides VoIP services
to customers.

Unfortunately this does not meet the requirements to be included in the
ISP list (even if you are using FreeBSD internally - which is great).

The purpose of the ISP list is to list companies which provide ISP
services to customers, for example webhosting, dedicated servers running
FreeBSD and so on.

Additionally to that there is no mentioning anywhere on your site that
FreeBSD is used in any part of your services.

Conclusion:  With the information currently available we cannot add your
company to the list as it does not meet the requirements.  So unless
more information is provided we will have to close this PR.

Set a timeout of 2 weeks:  After that the PR will be closed.

Regards


-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
